description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a light, natural wood grain finish and a minimalist design. The front face features two drawers with geometric cutout patterns, adding a decorative touch and providing storage functionality. The desk stands on four slender, angled metal legs that give it a modern, airy appearance while ensuring stability. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for writing, working, or placing objects. The sides and back are plain, with no additional features or ornamentation. The overall construction suggests a blend of contemporary and functional style, ideal for urban environments.
description: A modern rectangular wooden desk with decorative front drawers and slender metal legs, featuring a light wood grain finish and a spacious flat top.
description_view_0: Front view showing two decorative drawers with geometric cutouts and angled metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, uninterrupted wood grain surface and the slim profile of the desk.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a simple, flat wooden back with no drawers or ornamentation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain wood grain and metal legs.
attribute_orientation: The side with the decorative drawers and cutouts is intended to face the user, serving as the front of the desk, while the plain side is the back.
attribute_usage_context: writing desk or workspace for light office tasks
